subject: A massive serpentine wurm creature with a gaping fanged maw, emerging from terrain while small armored undead-looking warriors stand in the foreground
description: The art crop shows a towering wurm — a massive, segmented serpentine creature — rearing up with its enormous mouth wide open, revealing rows of jagged teeth. Its body is textured with earth-toned scales and patches of green moss or organic material. Debris and dirt scatter around it as it erupts from the ground. In the foreground, two small figures in blue-purple armor with glowing skull-like helmets stand facing the creature, dwarfed by its scale. The background suggests misty ruins or distant city structures under a pale sky. The mood is dread and scale — the viewer is positioned with the tiny soldiers, looking up at something incomprehensibly large.
foreground: two small armored figures with glowing purple skulls, standing amid scattered debris
background: misty ruins and pale sky, distant city silhouettes
emotion: looming dread — the creature is vast and indifferent, the soldiers small and outmatched
